title: Commit window: team collaboration surfaces
body: Opening commit window claim a1cf8e4c-e578-4337-80a7-87a798d382f6. Intended bundle: start-right-team skill/adapters, session-handoff team-routing amendment, ADR-181, team-start/action-trace research note, future-plan links, research indexes, ADR index, and Claude permission wiring. Current staged set is empty; active claims and active commit queue were empty before this window.
